g=function()return F(O,{},d,Y)end return g end,function(O,d)local Y=S(d)local g=function(g)return F(O,{g},d,Y)end return g end return(V(3052335-(-575875),{}))(Y(B))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[d(-35481+68956)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
